mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary policy that reduces borrowing costs and boosts equity valuations, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in > 60% of instances where FEDFUNDS declines by > 0.5% over 3 months, or Rank IC < 0.03 in 3-year rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp increase in nonfarm payrolls above 100k in a month signals strong labor market demand, driving corporate earnings growth and positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns in > 40% of triggered instances, or PAYEMS growth fails to correlate with SPX returns (Pearson r < 0.15).

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in GDP (GDPC1) and inflation (CPIAUCSL) indicates robust economic activity, creating positive forward returns for the S&P 500 over 60 trading days through improved corporate margins.
failure_condition: SPX returns are negative in > 50% of quarters where GDPC1 and CPIAUCSL both grow > 1% q/q, or interaction effect size drops below 0.05 in 5-year rolling regressions.

mechanism_narrative: A significant drop in industrial production (INDPRO) signals weakening manufacturing activity, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days through reduced corporate revenue expectations.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 55% of triggered instances, or INDPRO declines fail to predict SPX returns (t-test p > 0.10).

mechanism_narrative: A surge in housing starts (HOUST) above 1.25 million units signals increased construction activity and consumer confidence, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns in > 45% of triggered instances, or HOUST growth fails to correlate with SPX returns (Pearson r < 0.20).

mechanism_narrative: Persistent high inflation (CPIAUCSL > 3%) during a monetary tightening cycle creates uncertainty, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 50% of instances where CPIAUCSL > 3% and FEDFUNDS > 4%, or interaction effect size < 0.03 in 5-year regressions.

mechanism_narrative: A declining unemployment rate (UNRATE) below 4% during rising wage growth signals labor market tightness, creating negative S&P 500 forward returns over 60 trading days through inflationary pressures.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60d returns in > 55% of triggered instances, or combined UNRATE/CPIAUCSL signal fails to predict SPX returns (Rank IC < 0.04).

mechanism_narrative: A sharp decline in real sales (RSAFS) below 730 billion signals weak consumer demand, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days through reduced corporate profitability.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 50% of triggered instances, or RSAFS declines fail to correlate with SPX returns (Pearson r > -0.15).
